posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Struggling to streamline your sales pipeline, manage leads effectively, and close more deals? You’re not alone!

Join us for a FREE webinar where we’ll dive deep into monday.com CRM and its potential to transform your business development efforts!

In this webinar, you’ll learn:

Business Development Workflow
Mass Emailing
Web Forms
Lead Routing and Propensity
Email and Activity Capture
Reports and Dashboards
ROAD MAP – Email Sequencing for Campaigns

Whether you’re a seasoned sales pro or just starting out, this webinar is for you!

When? Thursday 29th February at 2pm (AEDT)

Secure your spot here: [Webinar] Using CRM for Business Development - monday.com
